brief: Create paid ad copy for Equipment Pros (https://equip-pros.com/). Audience: equipment pros (contractors, operators, fleet managers). Goal: generate higher-quality leads and sales (prioritize rich leads over volume). Create an offer based on website; if site content unavailable, propose a high-intent offer aligned with heavy equipment service/parts/rental/sales and qualify leads via requirements. Provide 3-5 variants suitable for Google Search (RSA) and optionally Meta. Include qualifying language to reduce low-quality leads.
